Table.name: CLLTRL_NN_FNNCL_ASST_ASSGNMNT
Table.commentInRDBMS: Collateral Non-financial asset assigment is the combination of Collateral and Non-financial asset indicating which Collateral is aggregated into which non-financial asset.

Column.name: CLLTRL_NN_FNNCL_ASST_ASSGNMNT_TYP
Column.comment: Collateral non-financial asset assignment type discriminates between the different types of combinations between Collateral and Non-financial asset

Column.name: TM_SNC_INTL_RCGNTN3
Column.comment: Time elapsed since initial recognition band classifies time elapsed since initial recognition in the balance sheet into bands used for FINREP reporting.

Column.name: DT_RFRNC7
Column.comment: The date the data refers to.

Column.name: RPRTNG_AGNT_ID7
Column.comment: Identifier of the reporting agent.

Column.name: HLD_SL_INDCTR2
Column.comment: Held for sale indicates the Non-current assets and instruments in disposal groups classified as held for sale in accordance with IFRS5. Is not applicable under national GAAP based on BAD.

Column.name: MSRMNT_MTHD1
Column.comment: Measurement method identifies the type of measurement method according to IAS (See IAS 16.30, 16.31 and IAS 40.33-55, 76). It distinguishes into their cost or revaluation model.

Column.name: SBJCT_OPRTNG_LS_INDCTR1
Column.comment: An indicator to specify if an object is subject to operating lease or not.

Column.name: PRPRTY_PLNT_EQPMNT_TKN_INT_PSSSSN_TYP1
Column.comment: A discriminator to distinguish between property, plant and equipment taken into possession during and before the reporting period.

Column.name: PRPRTY_PLNT_EQPMNT_TKN_INT_PSSSSN_ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVL1
Column.comment: Accounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.

Column.name: DT_RFRNC8
Column.comment: The date the data refers to.

Column.name: RPRTNG_AGNT_ID8
Column.comment: Identifier of the reporting agent.

Column.name: CLLTRL_ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVL
Column.comment: Accounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.

Column.name: CLLTRL_ID
Column.comment: An identifier to uniquely identify each collateral.

Column.name: OTHR_INTNGBL_ASST_TKN_INT_PSSSSN_TYP
Column.comment: Other intangible asset taken into possession type distinguishes other intangible asset between those taken into possession during the reporting period and those taken into possession before the reporting period.

Column.name: HLD_SL_INDCTR6
Column.comment: Held for sale indicates the Non-current assets and instruments in disposal groups classified as held for sale in accordance with IFRS5. Is not applicable under national GAAP based on BAD.

Column.name: MSRMNT_MTHD41
Column.comment: Measurement method identifies the type of measurement method according to IAS (See IAS 16.30, 16.31 and IAS 40.33-55, 76). It distinguishes into their cost or revaluation model.

Column.name: SFTWR_ASSTS_INDCTR1
Column.comment: Software asset indicator indicates whether the reported asset is a software asset or not.

Column.name: TM_SNC_INTL_RCGNTN2
Column.comment: Time elapsed since initial recognition band classifies time elapsed since initial recognition in the balance sheet into bands used for FINREP reporting.

Column.name: DT_RFRNC1
Column.comment: The date the data refers to.

Column.name: RPRTNG_AGNT_ID1
Column.comment: Identifier of the reporting agent.

Column.name: CLLTRL_ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVL5
Column.comment: Accounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.

Column.name: CLLTRL_ID5
Column.comment: An identifier to uniquely identify each collateral.

Column.name: DT_RFRNC2
Column.comment: The date the data refers to.

Column.name: RPRTNG_AGNT_ID2
Column.comment: Identifier of the reporting agent.

Column.name: PRPRTY_PLNT_EQPMNT_TKN_INT_PSSSSN_ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVL
Column.comment: Accounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.

Column.name: HLD_SL_INDCTR21
Column.comment: Held for sale indicates the Non-current assets and instruments in disposal groups classified as held for sale in accordance with IFRS5. Is not applicable under national GAAP based on BAD.

Column.name: MSRMNT_MTHD11
Column.comment: Measurement method identifies the type of measurement method according to IAS (See IAS 16.30, 16.31 and IAS 40.33-55, 76). It distinguishes into their cost or revaluation model.

Column.name: SBJCT_OPRTNG_LS_INDCTR11
Column.comment: An indicator to specify if an object is subject to operating lease or not.

Column.name: TM_SNC_INTL_RCGNTN
Column.comment: Time elapsed since initial recognition band classifies time elapsed since initial recognition in the balance sheet into bands used for FINREP reporting.

Column.name: PRPRTY_PLNT_EQPMNT_TKN_INT_PSSSSN_TYP
Column.comment: A discriminator to distinguish between property, plant and equipment taken into possession during and before the reporting period.

Column.name: DT_RFRNC3
Column.comment: The date the data refers to.

Column.name: RPRTNG_AGNT_ID3
Column.comment: Identifier of the reporting agent.

Column.name: CLLTRL_ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVL6
Column.comment: Accounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.

Column.name: CLLTRL_ID6
Column.comment: An identifier to uniquely identify each collateral.

Column.name: SBJCT_OPRTNG_LS_INDCTR
Column.comment: An indicator to specify if an object is subject to operating lease or not.

Column.name: DT_RFRNC4
Column.comment: The date the data refers to.

Column.name: RPRTNG_AGNT_ID4
Column.comment: Identifier of the reporting agent.

Column.name: PRPRTY_PLNT_EQPMNT_NT_TKN_INT_PSSSSN_ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVL1
Column.comment: Accounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.

Column.name: HLD_SL_INDCTR1
Column.comment: Held for sale indicates the Non-current assets and instruments in disposal groups classified as held for sale in accordance with IFRS5. Is not applicable under national GAAP based on BAD.

Column.name: MSRMNT_MTHD2
Column.comment: Measurement method identifies the type of measurement method according to IAS (See IAS 16.30, 16.31 and IAS 40.33-55, 76). It distinguishes into their cost or revaluation model.

Column.name: SBJCT_OPRTNG_LS_INDCTR2
Column.comment: An indicator to specify if an object is subject to operating lease or not.

Column.name: CLLTRL_ID2
Column.comment: An identifier to uniquely identify each collateral.

Column.name: DT_RFRNC
Column.comment: The date the data refers to.

Column.name: RPRTNG_AGNT_ID
Column.comment: Identifier of the reporting agent.

Column.name: INVSTMNT_PRPRTY_ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVL
Column.comment: Accounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.

Column.name: HLD_SL_INDCTR41
Column.comment: Held for sale indicates the Non-current assets and instruments in disposal groups classified as held for sale in accordance with IFRS5. Is not applicable under national GAAP based on BAD.

Column.name: MSRMNT_MTHD21
Column.comment: Measurement method identifies the type of measurement method according to IAS (See IAS 16.30, 16.31 and IAS 40.33-55, 76). It distinguishes into their cost or revaluation model.

Column.name: SBJCT_OPRTNG_LS_INDCTR21
Column.comment: An indicator to specify if an object is subject to operating lease or not.

Column.name: DT_RFRNC5
Column.comment: The date the data refers to.

Column.name: RPRTNG_AGNT_ID5
Column.comment: Identifier of the reporting agent.

Column.name: CLLTRL_ID1
Column.comment: An identifier to uniquely identify each collateral.

Column.name: CLLTRL_ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVL1
Column.comment: Accounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.

Column.name: MSRMNT_MTHD31
Column.comment: Measurement method identifies the type of measurement method according to IAS (See IAS 16.30, 16.31 and IAS 40.33-55, 76). It distinguishes into their cost or revaluation model.

Column.name: SFTWR_ASSTS_INDCTR
Column.comment: Software asset indicator indicates whether the reported asset is a software asset or not.

Column.name: TM_SNC_INTL_RCGNTN11
Column.comment: Time elapsed since initial recognition band classifies time elapsed since initial recognition in the balance sheet into bands used for FINREP reporting.
